Main complexity comes from REST CRUD operations, assignment workflows, paginated lists, query filtering, full-text search, nested search filters, comments, multipart attachment uploads with a 25 MB limit, batch task operations supporting 1-50 operations, schema reuse through $ref, enum constraints, UUID/date-time/pattern validation, pagination models, and structured error responses.
